The Perfect Man (2005)

Theatrical Performance
Domestic Box Office $16,535,005Details
International Box Office $3,000,000
Worldwide Box Office $19,535,005
Further financial details...

Metrics

Opening Weekend:$5,300,980 (32.1% of total gross)
Legs:3.12 (domestic box office/biggest weekend)
Domestic Share:84.6% (domestic box office/worldwide)
Production Budget:$10,000,000 (worldwide box office is 2.0 times production budget)
Theater counts:2,087 opening theaters/2,090 max. theaters, 3.1 weeks average run per theater
Infl. Adj. Dom. BO $29,174,858

Movie Details

Domestic Releases: June 17th, 2005 (Wide) by Universal
Video Release: November 1st, 2005 by Universal Home Entertainment, released as Perfect Man, The
MPA Rating: PG for some mildly suggestive content
Running Time: 100 minutes
Plot point: Divorcée Romance, Romance
Target audience: Tween
Source:Original Screenplay
Genre:Romantic Comedy
Production Method:Live Action
Creative Type:Contemporary Fiction
Production Countries: United States
Languages: English
